title: 给 AI 安排好任务，让它操作浏览器，修改域名解析，帮我把一个网站上线。然后我去厨房削苹果。削着削着就在想， MD 为什么是我在这削苹果，而不是我去上线网站。
content: The author reflects on assigning AI tasks like deploying a website while doing menial chores, questioning why they handle manual labor instead of the reverse. The material also includes a minimalist community website footer for "V2EX," showing navigation links, online user count, timezone information, and a motto about creative solitude.

title: 用了多年的火绒，今晚我卸掉了它
content:
我是个老火绒用户。没有广告弹窗，不捆绑全家桶，占用小，规则可以自定义；这些年国内杀毒软件生态一塌糊涂，火绒几乎是唯一一个让我觉得"这玩意儿是站在用户这边的"软件。 一年前自己加了几条自定义规则，用来防止腾讯 ACE 反作弊驱动扫描我的硬盘。一切就从那几条规则开始。

微信的锅？…

title: 乒乓球德甲决赛，樊振东独得两分，萨尔布吕肯赢得冠军成就赛季三冠王，如何评价本场比赛？
content: On May 31, Fan Zhendong-led Saarbrücken defeated Düsseldorf 3-1 in the German Table Tennis Bundesliga final. Fan won both his matches against Qiu Dang and Jha, securing two crucial points. Saarbrücken completed a historic season treble, having already won the Champions League and German Cup earlier.

content: In the Bundesliga final, Fan Zhendong of Saarbrücken faced Düsseldorf. The lineup included Fan vs. Qiu Dang in the first match, Jorgic vs. Jha in the second, Franziska vs. Karlberg in the third, and Fan vs. Kanak Jha in the fourth, with doubles pending. Fan won his first match against Qiu Dang 3-1.

title: 翻倍又闪崩！AI故事讲不下去了？
content: Lianhua Holding, a former MSG giant, saw its stock double since March on AI and semiconductor crossover bets before crashing over 20% in three days. The company has pivoted from flavorings to computing leasing, AI hardware, and ABF film for chip packaging—mimicking Japan's Ajinomoto. However, its computing subsidiary remains loss-making, an 82% computing contract was terminated, and its newly acquired ABF firm is insolvent. Despite genuine R&D efforts and China's import-replacement opportunity, Lianhua's scattered resources across unrelated sectors and history of failed diversifications raise serious doubts about its transformation.

title: 华尔街最火00后
content: Leopold Aschenbrenner, a 25-year-old German prodigy who graduated from Columbia at 19 and was fired from OpenAI in 2024 for alleged leaks, founded hedge fund Situational Awareness LP later that year. He bet against crowded AI chip stocks like Nvidia via put options while investing heavily in AI infrastructure: power, data centers, and energy. His fund grew from $255 million to $13.7 billion by Q1 2025. Key holdings include Bloom Energy and data center firms. His contrarian thesis—that physical constraints, not algorithms, limit AI progress—proved prescient as tech giants massively increased infrastructure spending.

Five executives at Sanhua Intelligent Controls completed share reductions by March 30, 2026, citing children's education. CEO Zhang Yabo sold 9.756 million shares at 43.1 yuan/share, cashing out approximately 420 million yuan. Four other executives collectively sold 343,300 shares for about 14.8 million yuan. President Wang Dayong's 2025 compensation of 4.4371 million yuan exceeded Chairman Zhang's 3.4454 million yuan. The other executives earned 2.7545 million, 2.0417 million, and 1.7903 million yuan respectively.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 量化投资188

title: AI 赋能 + 流程优化：软件测试成本管控新思路
content: 软件测试成本一直是企业IT预算中难以忽视的一笔开支。从人力投入、工具采购到环境维护，测试环节的支出往往超出预期，而回报却难以量化。面对日益复杂的应用系统和不断加快的交付节奏，如何有效控制测试成本同时保障质量，成为摆在每个技术管理者面前的难题。 Testin云测在服务数千家企…
source: 开源中国-全部 - 开源科技

title: 软件测试效率困境：为什么70%的团队仍在挣扎
content:
软件测试一直是软件开发生命周期中不可或缺的一环，但在追求快速交付的今天，许多团队却陷入了一个尴尬的困境：测试周期不断压缩，质量要求却不降反升。这种矛盾正在成为行业普遍面临的挑战。 为什么测试阶段总是拖慢上线节奏

在很多企业中，测试环节常常被视为“最后的一道关卡…

title: 不止于“找Bug”：如何管理软件测试成本与质量风险？
content:
一、软件测试成本为什么总是超预算？ 在企业年度IT预算复盘会议上，软件测试费用超支已成为一个老生常谈的话题。测试成本攀升的驱动因素是多方面的。

从管理角度看，成本超支的深层原因往往在于规划阶段对测试工作量的低估，以及执行阶段对资源调配的失控。许多企业在项目立项时…

title: 现在如果要加密备份到云盘的文件，有哪些方案
content: Several cross-platform options exist for encrypting files before uploading to cloud storage. Cryptomator provides transparent client-side encryption for major cloud services. VeraCrypt offers container-based encryption across systems. Rclone supports built-in encryption for cloud backups. Boxcryptor provides commercial alternatives. For command-line users, tools like GnuPG or age enable file encryption. Many also use encrypted archives (7-Zip/AES) or filesystem-level solutions like eCryptfs/EncFS for Linux, though compatibility varies across operating systems.

title: 段永平，百亿真爱“赌”王宁
content:
Duan Yongping, known as "China's Buffett," invested billions to become Pop Mart's second-largest shareholder with a 5.69% stake, valuing his holdings at roughly HK$13.23 billion. He was drawn to founder Wang Ning's management philosophy after reading a book about him, comparing Wang's business understanding to Steve Jobs'.

Wang, a self-described "atypical entrepreneur," built Pop Mart from a 2010 general store into a global IP empire worth over HK$300 billion. His management style emphasizes patience, "respecting time and operations," and cultivating ordinary but loyal teams through trust-based "romanticism" rather than elite credentials. Key strategic pivots include transforming from retailer to IP developer after losing a crucial agency in 2016, and expanding overseas while competitors retreated during COVID-19 downturns.

Wang practices restraint through "seven-tenths full" product philosophy—controlling scarcity

title: “五道口”跑出116个独角兽
content: Beijing leads China with 116 unicorn companies valued at over $740 billion by end-2025, per a new report. Haidian District, particularly the Zhongguancun/Wudaokou area, hosts the densest concentration, with AI firms dominating—40 of the 116. This ecosystem thrives on top universities (Tsinghua, Peking University), deep government and industry应用场景, venture capital networks, and a self-reinforcing循环 of successful founders reinvesting. Emerging sectors poised to produce the next unicorns include embodied intelligence and AI-driven scientific research, backed by policy support and existing infrastructure advantages.

title: 司机激活智驾并双手脱离方向盘不到一分钟，撞上半挂车，轿车上一家三口身亡，智驾真的能解放双手吗？
content: A driver activated intelligent driving and removed both hands from the steering wheel. Less than a minute later, the car collided with a heavy semi-trailer truck, killing all three family members in the sedan. The incident raises serious questions about whether intelligent driving technology truly allows drivers to completely disengage from controlling the vehicle.

Claims that major IPOs will end the current bull market rely on flawed historical comparisons. In 2007, CSI 300 averaged PE 41.6x with market-wide overvaluation and economic overheating; today it is ~14x. In 2015, leverage, not IPOs, caused collapse: margin balance hit 4% of market cap versus 2.7% now. Current corporate earnings show steady growth: A-share revenue and profits reached three-year highs, with ChiNext net profit up 21.5% and STAR Market up 26.3% annually, and Q1 revenue growth exceeding 21% for both. The author views any IPO-related turbulence as temporary, expecting quality undervalued stocks to continue rising.

title: 茶饮“早餐大战”打响？
content: Major tea chains are aggressively expanding beyond beverages into breakfast, coffee, and snacks as market saturation forces a shift from store growth to revenue per location. Guming plans ovens in 13,000 stores by August for heated pastries priced at 8.9-9.9 yuan, while Baxie Tea Ji rolls out ice cream and Chayan Yuese opens snack shops. However, Mixue Bingcheng quietly ended its breakfast pilot after four months, highlighting execution challenges. Franchisees face tough decisions: extra equipment costs, morning staffing needs, and whether incremental sales actually improve profits. Urban-rural demand splits complicate rollout plans. The industry agrees "comprehensive stores" are inevitable, but success depends on matching format to brand identity rather than random product stacking.

title: 暴增3100亿！存储巨头大普微，估值泡沫已现
content: Chinese SSD company Dapuwei went public on April 16 at 46.08 yuan per share, surging over 1,500% to reach a 330.6 billion yuan market cap within six weeks—a 310 billion yuan increase. The founder's stake jumped to 36.8 billion yuan. The company is one of few domestic firms with full-stack self-developed enterprise SSD capabilities, serving major cloud providers including ByteDance, Tencent, and Alibaba. However, Q1 revenue of 1.31 billion yuan and profits of 370 million yuan cannot justify the extreme valuation. The company holds just 3% domestic market share, faces intense foreign competition from Samsung and SK Hynix, relies heavily on a few customers, and depends on imported NAND flash with limited pricing power.

Li Fei-Fei's team found that AI can be tricked into generating false medical diagnoses from blank images presented as X-rays. Meng院士 notes that analyzing AI through one-dimensional, two-dimensional, and three-dimensional perspectives reveals that most AI systems still lack true understanding of the three-dimensional world.

title: 蓝色起源火箭爆炸重创 NASA 登月计划；微软打造 Copilot 超级应用；多名特斯拉前员工坦言不信赖 FSD | 极客早知道 | 原文
content: Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket exploded during a ground ignition test at its Florida LC-36 launch site, destroying the only launch tower and severely damaging facilities. The explosion, occurring during a "hot-fire test" of the seven first-stage engines, deals a major blow to NASA's lunar base plans and Amazon's low-earth orbit broadband constellation "Leo." The 322-foot rocket was scheduled for its maiden flight. No injuries were reported.

title: 复旦学姐，估值1000亿
content: Fireworks AI, an AI inference platform founded in 2022 by Fudan alumna Lin Qiao, is in talks for new funding at a $15 billion valuation. The company helps enterprises deploy open-source AI models via token-based pricing, processing 30 trillion tokens daily. Qiao, a former Meta engineering leader who co-created PyTorch, built the startup with ex-Meta colleagues. Revenue hit $315 million annualized by February 2026, growing 416% year-over-year. The deal follows a broader surge in AI valuations globally, with rivals like Anthropic and OpenAI also reaching massive figures.

title: 日元沦为全球“最弱货币”？
content: The yen has become the world's weakest currency by real effective exchange rate, surpassing even the Turkish lira, which had suffered from chronic high inflation and loose monetary policy. Japan's currency faces structural pressure from persistent trade deficits, rising oil prices, and deteriorating fiscal credibility due to expansionary policies. Government intervention of about 10 trillion yen has temporarily propped up the yen. Sustained 2% expected inflation and structural reforms are seen as key to halting the yen's decline long-term.

title: ChatGPT Pro 5X 双倍结束，建议升级 Pro 20X
content: The ChatGPT Pro 20X tier replaces the Pro 5X plan, which is no longer offering doubled quota. Users upgrading to Pro 20X receive prorated credit for remaining Pro 5X subscription time, with flexible daily rate calculations. Downgrades only take effect after the current billing period ends. One user reported that after the reset, a single development request consumed 8% of quota, prompting immediate upgrade. Post-upgrade, quotas reset within five hours.

Goldman Sachs identifies MLCCs as the next bottleneck in AI infrastructure. A single NVIDIA Rubin rack requires ~600,000 MLCCs worth over $4,300—a 182% value increase. MLCCs serve as instantaneous voltage stabilizers for GPUs during power spikes. AI server demand for MLCCs will quadruple by 2030, yet annual supply growth remains ~10%. High-capacity MLCC production requires 2-3 months to retool with 20-30% efficiency losses. Current order-to-shipment ratios near 1.2 and 20+ week lead times indicate early-stage pricing cycles. A 5% price increase would boost Murata and Taiyo Yuden profits 13% and 37% respectively by 2027. Chinese manufacturers like Fenghua Advanced and Three-Circle leverage structural shortages in general-purpose MLCCs while advancing high-capacity capabilities for domestic server auxiliary modules.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 陆家嘴幽灵

title: “爸爸品牌”，正在集体自救
content: China's traditional menswear brands—Youngor, HLA, Septwolves, and Joeone—face existential pressure as business formal wear has become associated with aging. Young leadership is driving transformation: Youngor's second-generation chair Li Hanqiong acquired streetwear and outdoor brands, bought retail chains, and exited real estate to rebuild as a lifestyle platform. Competitors pursue youth-oriented strategies through social media, celebrity partnerships, functional fabrics, and casual/sportswear lines. While new revenues are emerging, traditional segments still decline faster than replacements grow, leaving most brands reliant on investment income for profits.

title: edge 浏览器就算使用了 disk cache 有时候还是会卡一两秒的真实原因可能是什么？能不能解决？
content: Edge sometimes lags for 1-2 seconds even with disk cache enabled, unlike Chrome's instant loading. A user tested this with service worker SWR caching and large max-age HTML files, both causing delays. Microsoft support claimed Chrome's aggressive caching and connection reuse make it faster, dismissing it as not a bug. The user remains skeptical, suspecting intentional underperformance for future "optimizations."

StepFun offers free 30-day access to its new Step 3.7 Flash multimodal model for Hermes Agent users via Nous Portal. OpenClaw's May 28 update adds Claude Opus 4.8 and Krea image models, with faster startup times and 52.8% smaller install size. Xiaomi detailed MiMo-V2.5 inference optimizations achieving 93% KV Cache hit rates and 40% performance gains. MiniMax launched A-share IPO proceedings after its Hong Kong listing. SoftBank plans up to €75 billion for 5 GW of AI data centers in France. OpenAI is reportedly developing a "Translation Block" feature for ChatGPT, including fictional languages.

title: 沉浸式用 AI，或许正在侵蚀你的长期效率
content: AI tools create an immersion trap that can harm long-term productivity. Users should track time spent on AI interactions, measure actual output quality against costs including deferred priority tasks, and assess whether cognitive offloading erodes independent thinking skills. Early-career professionals especially need direct practice to build expertise, using AI for feedback rather than core work completion.

title: 2026 05 31 HackerNews
content: HackerNews top stories from May 31, 2026 cover: SQLite as sufficient for durable workflows with Litestream backup; criticism of forced modal overlays ("dickover" UI pattern); Danish pension fund excluding SpaceX over governance concerns; Anthropic surpassing OpenAI in valuation near $1T; debate over MCP protocol's practical utility versus CLI alternatives; Pandoc template repository launch; Zig's new ELF linker and build system rewrite; proposed US funding rules threatening scientific peer review; OpenBSD's openrsync implementation; and escalating conflict between Microsoft and a researcher over Windows zero-day disclosures.

title: 欧足联携手阿里巴巴，达成多年战略合作
content: Alibaba Group has partnered with UEFA and UC3 in Budapest on May 29 for a multi-year strategic collaboration. Alibaba will serve as the official exclusive partner for AI, cloud computing services, and e-commerce for the UEFA Champions League, Europa League, and Conference League from the 2027/2028 to 2032/2033 seasons, as well as for UEFA Euro 2028.

title: 丹麦养老基金将 SpaceX 列入黑名单：治理状况堪忧 估值严重过高
content: Danish pension fund AkademikerPension, managing approximately $25 billion in assets, has blacklisted SpaceX due to poor governance and severe overvaluation. The fund, which previously excluded Tesla and U.S. Treasury bonds, cited ESG concerns—particularly weak corporate governance—as the primary reason for excluding the space company from its investment portfolio.

content: Paris Saint-Germain defeated Arsenal in the 2025-26 UEFA Champions League final to win back-to-back titles. After a 1-1 draw through 120 minutes of play, PSG prevailed 4-3 in a penalty shootout at the tournament's conclusion on May 30. The match drew tens of thousands of spectators to the stadium.
